summary: Iter-12 milestone flywheel verified end-to-end (backend + frontend). All 6 new milestone backend tests pass: (1) no-fire when cost<$1, (2) $1 tier fires with milestone_alerts row keyed '<uid>:milestone:1' + auto-created share_links row, (3) idempotency holds on repeat proxy_chat call, (4) multi-tier bump to $25 fires $20 only (not $1 again), (5) cross-jump fresh user at $150 fires only highest unseen tier $100, (6) existing manual share_link is reused (no duplicate). Admin /overview now returns referrals, milestones_fired, auto_share_links (all ints). Frontend Admin Console renders 9 KPI tiles including the 3 new ones (Referrals=9, Milestones fired=5, Auto share links=3 at test time). Resend send attempts confirmed in backend logs (sandbox-rejected to non-allowlisted addresses, which is the expected gating per the agent note). 13/13 iter-11 regression tests still pass. Showcase endpoint correctly returns auto-created share-link users with cost>0.

minor.issue: Milestone email subject string is '[TokenForge] You just saved $1 — share your receipt' but spec asked subject containing 'You just saved $1' — matches. No issue, just confirming.

Rate limits (8/600s and 10/300s) are aggressive enough that running the full regression suite back-to-back trips 429s on tail tests. Not iter-12 specific but worth noting for test harness — consider IP allowlist or env-toggle for QA.

issues: KPI grid is lg:grid-cols-6 with 9 tiles → last row shows 3 empty bordered cells beside the 3 new KPIs. Cosmetic, not broken. Suggest lg:grid-cols-3 (3x3) or 9-col layout.

action_items: (Optional) Tweak Admin.jsx KPI grid to avoid 3 empty cells when 9 tiles are shown — e.g. grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-9, or split into two rows of meaningful groups.
critical_code_review_comments: _check_milestone fires only the HIGHEST unseen tier per request (correct per spec & confirmed by tests) but means a single $150 jump leaves $1 and $20 tiers unfired until the next proxy_chat call. That's intentional anti-spam behavior, but make sure marketing copy doesn't promise an email per tier crossed.
milestone_alerts.create_index('key', unique=True) provides DB-level dedupe safety on top of the find_one+insert race window — good.

share_links auto-creation reads `share = await db.share_links.find_one({user_id})` then inserts if missing. Under heavy concurrency, two parallel proxy_chat calls could both insert (no unique index on user_id). Low risk because milestone trigger is gated by milestone_alerts dedupe, but worth a unique index on share_links.user_id if desired.
Resend sandbox rejection is swallowed by try/except + log.exception; the milestone_alerts row is committed before send attempt, so re-fire never happens even if email fails. Good fail-open behavior.

showcase_savings iterates db.share_links (limit 200) and aggregates per user inline — O(N) MongoDB roundtrips. Fine for current scale but should be reworked to a single aggregation pipeline once share_links count > a few hundred.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (admin KPI grid renders 9 tiles incl. all 3 new)

test_credentials: admin@tokenforge.io / ForgeAdmin!2026 (per /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Fresh QA users registered ad-hoc as TEST_iter12_<scenario>_<rand>@qa.tokenforge.io.
seed_data_creation: Inserted proxy_requests rows directly into Mongo to seed cost_saved_usd ($1.50, $25.0, $150.0) for milestone trigger tests. Did NOT clean these up — they linger in db.proxy_requests and will keep the relevant test users in /api/showcase/savings (intentional, so regression idempotency tests next iter still see them).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter-12 milestone flywheel is fully verified. The new regression spine is /app/backend/tests/test_tokenforge_iter12_milestones.py (6 tests). Running it alongside iter11 tests within a 10-minute window will trip auth_register rate limits (8/600s), causing 2-3 unrelated 429 failures in iter7_widget smoke. Either space test runs out or add a higher RL allowance for QA IP. Mongo state: ~70+ TEST_ users created across iterations, some with non-zero cost_saved → they appear in /api/showcase/savings.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in iter-12 implementation.
